title: Service Pages (Part 1) — Heat/Climate related
description:
Convert "İlgili Markalar" bullet-point brand lists to Mintlify CardGroup/Card components in these service pages: isi-pompalari.mdx, klima-sistemleri.mdx, radyator.mdx, yerden-isitma-sistemleri.mdx, akilli-oda-termostatlari.mdx, termosifonik-sistemler.mdx, su-depolari.mdx.

Each page already lists related brands under an "İlgili Markalar" or similar section. Replace the bullet-point list with a `<CardGroup>` containing `<Card title="..." icon="..." href="/markalar/..."></Card>` components. Use the existing `su-aritma-sistemleri.mdx` as the reference pattern.

For each Card, use the brand name as `title`, the brand slug as `icon` (or omit icon if no matching image exists), and `/markalar/{slug}` as `href`.
summary: Successfully converted brand bullet-point lists to Mintlify CardGroup/Card components across all 7 heat/climate-related service pages. Applied to: isi-pompalari.mdx (2 CardGroups — 12+1 brands), klima-sistemleri.mdx (3 CardGroups — 3+1+2 brands), radyator.mdx (2 CardGroups — 3+1 brands), yerden-isitma-sistemleri.mdx (2 CardGroups — 3+7 brands), akilli-oda-termostatlari.mdx (2 CardGroups — 2+2 brands), termosifonik-sistemler.mdx (1 CardGroup — 6 brands, self-closing), su-depolari.mdx (1 CardGroup — 3 brands, self-closing). All tags balanced, section headings preserved, descriptive text migrated inside Card components. Missing varmeks.mdx already tracked by existing task FN-002.

log.outcome: A well-structured, highly detailed specification for a mechanical content-markup conversion across 7 heat/climate-related service pages. All target files exist, all referenced brand links point to real files in `markalar/`, the reference pattern in `su-aritma-sistemleri.mdx` is confirmed, and the decomposition from the original FN-012 is cleanly scoped with no overlap with FN-014 or FN-015.
